specialRules.name: already-shipped
specialRules.note: SHIP outside 'preparing' is an observable rejection.

specialRules.name: not-in-transit
specialRules.note: DELIVER outside 'inTransit' is an observable rejection.

specialRules.name: cancel-too-late
specialRules.note: CANCEL_SHIPMENT is applicable from 'preparing' AND 'inTransit' — the whole non-terminal window — so the parent's terminal cancel always lands.

noOpRule: An action that does not apply in the current state is reject(reason).
